description_long: This handbag features a rectangular body with a wide, flat base and gently rounded corners, providing a spacious main compartment. The exterior is predominantly black, accented by a vibrant, symmetrical tie-dye pattern in shades of blue, green, yellow, and pink, which runs horizontally across the lower half and is mirrored on both sides. The bag is equipped with two long, slender shoulder straps, also adorned with the tie-dye motif, attached to the body with small gold-tone hardware. The top of the bag appears to have a zipper closure, ensuring the contents are secure. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for urban environments and casual outings. No visible brand logo or additional decorative elements are present, keeping the focus on the bold pattern.
description: A rectangular black handbag with a colorful tie-dye pattern and long matching shoulder straps, featuring a zipper closure and gold-tone hardware.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black body, vibrant tie-dye band, and both shoulder straps with gold-tone attachments.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile, the continuation of the tie-dye pattern, and the narrowness of the bag.
description_view_2: Back view mirroring the front, with the same tie-dye band and strap arrangement visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the tie-dye pattern wrapping around the base.
attribute_strap_type: Two long, non-adjustable shoulder straps with tie-dye pattern, attached with gold-tone hardware.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Zipper closure located at the top center of the bag.
attribute_pattern: Symmetrical, horizontal tie-dye pattern in blue, green, yellow, and pink on a black background.
